NCT04770753.name: ENERGIZE
NCT04770753.group: Non-transfusion-dependent alpha/beta-thalassemia, mitapivat 100 mg PO BID vs placebo (Hb response wk 12-24 primary)

allOutcomes.title: Hemoglobin response (>=1.0 g/dL increase wk 12-24, RR vs placebo; primary)
Change in FACIT-Fatigue at week 24 (MD vs placebo; key secondary)

NCT04770753.snippet: Source: Glenthoj AP et al. (ENERGIZE) NEJM 2024;391:1493-1503.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Documented diagnosis of thalassemia (β-thalassemia with or without α-globin gene mutations, hemoglobin E (HbE)/β-thalassemia, or α-thalassemia/hemoglobin H [HbH] disease) based on Hb electrophoresis, Hb high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC)), and/or deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) analysis;~* Hb concentration ≤10.0 grams per deciliter (g/dL) (100.0 grams per liter [g/L]), based on an average of at least 2 Hb concentration measurements (separated by ≥7 days) collect...

title: RapidMeta Hematology | Mitapivat (PK Activator) in Non-Transfusion-Dependent Thalassemia v1.0
